title: Federal Corporations - Open Government Portal
content:
## Federal Corporations
As of April 2026, we have improved the “Federal Corporations” dataset by dividing the data into four subsets, each in both official languages.
Files are typically updated daily.
Dataset descriptions
An active corporation is one that has not been dissolved or otherwise legally terminated under its governing legislation.
An inactive corporation is one that no longer exists or is no longer governed by legislation administered by Corporations Canada.
The datasets do NOT include information about corporations created under financial legislation (such as financial institutions, insurance companies or loan and trust companies) or those created under provincial, territorial or other corporate legislation.
Active business corporations
The dataset only contains information about federal business corporations created under the Canada Business Corporations Act (CBCA) that are currently active.
Other active corporations
The dataset only contains information about the following types of federal corporations that are currently active:
- not-for-profit corporations created under the Canada Not-for-profit Corporations Act (NFP Act)
- cooperatives created under the Canada Cooperatives Act (Coop Act)
- board of trades created under the Boards of Trade Act (BOTA)
- corporations administered by a Special Act of Parliament.
Inactive business corporations
The dataset only contains information about federal business corporations created under the Canada Business Corporations Act (CBCA) that are currently inactive.
Other inactive corporations
The dataset only contains information about the following types of federal corporations that are currently inactive:
- not-for-profit corporations created under the Canada Not-for-profit Corporations Act (NFP Act)
- not-for-profit corporations created under the Canada Corporations Act, Part II (CCA II)
- cooperatives created under the Canada Cooperatives Act (Coop Act)
- board of trades created under the Boards of Trade Act (BOTA)
- corporations administered by a Special Act of Parliament.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada
- Publisher - Organization Name at Publication: Industry Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
